label: Positions Table
description: Main positions table with filters, instrument links, side, P&L, margin, and trades drill-down.

checks.0.1_error_boundary: pass — WidgetErrorBoundary wraps all widgets in widget-wrapper.tsx line 89
checks.0.4_no_any_ts_ignore: pass — no any or @ts-ignore; as unknown as Record<string, unknown>[] casts on export data are type-safe narrowings
checks.0.5_no_mock_imports: pass — widget imports only from context, shared, and ui components
checks.0.6_loading_state: pass — isLoading={positionsLoading} passed to TableWidget which renders skeleton
checks.0.7_empty_state: pass — emptyMessage="No positions match your filters" passed to TableWidget
checks.0.8_error_state: pass — error={positionsError ? "Failed to load positions" : null} + onRetry={refetchPositions} passed to TableWidget
checks.0.9_dead_code: pass — no commented-out blocks or unreachable branches

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. No fixes required.

checks.1.1_data_from_context: pass — all data (filteredPositions, filters, actions, classifyInstrument, getInstrumentRoute) exclusively from usePositionsData()
checks.1.2_context_uses_global_scope: pass — positions-data-context.tsx uses useGlobalScope() and scopeStrategyIds
checks.1.3_org_filter: pass — positions filtered by scopeStrategyIds derived from globalScope.organizationIds
checks.1.4_client_filter: pass — getStrategyIdsForScope accepts clientIds; cascades through org→client→strategy
checks.1.5_strategy_filter: pass — local strategyFilter + URL param strategy_id + globalScope.strategyIds all applied
checks.1.6_no_filter_shows_all: pass — scopeStrategyIds.length === 0 skips scope filter (context line 584)
checks.1.7_reference_data_location: pass — widget has no inline reference data; formatCurrency from lib/reference-data; formatPercent from lib/utils/formatters

l1.notes: Context (read-only): DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS inline in context is a context-layer issue, not a widget concern. Also noted: positions-data-context exposes classifyInstrument and getInstrumentRoute as stable functions — widget correctly receives them via context rather than defining them locally.

knownIssues.description: DEFI_MOCK_POSITIONS (5 hardcoded positions) is defined inline in positions-data-context.tsx. Should be moved to lib/mocks/fixtures/ once context is refactored.
